mapper.select: SELECT id, project_id, user_id, role, join_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM project_member WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0

SELECT id, project_id, user_id, role, join_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, deleted FROM project_member WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT project_id FROM project_member WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE project_member SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND deleted = 0
